title: Aigostar 2000W Electric Fan Heater, Energy Efficient Space Heater with Remote Control, 70° Oscillation, 4 Modes, 24H Timer, Overheat & Tip-Over Protection - Silent Ceramic Heater for Home/Bedroom
features: 【FAST HEATING】The Aigostar space heater delivers instant, powerful heat in just 3 seconds. Its 2000W high-performance system, featuring advanced PTC ceramic heating elements, heats faster and more efficiently than traditional heaters. Perfect for bedrooms, living rooms, offices, and hot yoga studios.

【4 MODES & ENERGY SAVING】This electric heater features a handle for easy portability and four modes (low, high, ECO, and fan only) for personalized comfort. The smart energy-saving ECO mode (minimum 1400 watts, maximum 2000 watts) adjusts power based on ambient temperature, helping reduce heating costs while maintaining warmth.

【70° OSCILLATION & QUIET HEATING】This portable heater adopts 70° wide-angle heating, which can better dissipate heat from multiple directions, providing warmth to a large area of your surroundings (up to 20㎡) . Low-noise design ensures quiet, even heat distribution, keeping you undisturbed during sleep or work.

【LED TOUCH PANEL & REMOTE CONTROL】Designed for your convenience and comfort, this fan heater features LED touch control panel and a remote control, allowing you to control the heater without having to get out of bed on cold winter days. The 1-24 hour timer and display auto-darkening feature make it more user friendly at night.

【MULTIFUL SECURITY PROTECTIONS】Our room heater come with multiple safety features including built-in smart tip-over protection, overheat protection, 24-hour timer, 12-hour automatic power off without interaction and sturdy 1.83m long power cord. A 30-second countdown timer protects the office heater and extends its life after the power is cut off.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 24H TIMER The 1-24 hour timer and display auto-darkening feature make it more user friendly at night. Temperature Adjustable With a digital space heater in the temperature range of 5-35℃, you can precisely set and control the desired temperature. Dual Protection Function If the temperature inside the device exceeds the normal working environment or it tips over, the heater will automatically turn off. Portable Handle A hidden carry handle on the back ensures the heater can be easily moved when needed. Compact size, can be easily stored when not in use
